历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1905, 2217, 2255, 1401, and 1454 respectively. Rankings continuously shifted backward by about 350 places from 2021 to 2023, then significantly moved forward to 1401 in 2024 (854 places ahead of 2023), and remained basically stable at 1454 in 2025. The notable forward shift in rankings over the past two years reflects a rebound in application popularity, with a baseline of approximately 1454 for 2025. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 100, 98, 92, 92, and 88 respectively, showing a gradual annual reduction. The 2026 plan is 83, a further reduction of 5 (-5.68%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to continuous enrollment cuts.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League. It has consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher-student ethics incident (rumors of inappropriate relationships between leaders and students), but the university has responded that the rumors are false and has filed a case, with limited impact. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. No records of admission gaps were found in the 2021-2025 abnormal admission files, indicating stable admission trends. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Mechanical Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering were rated A+, while Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, and Mechanics were rated A, and Electronic Science and Technology, and Biomedical Engineering were rated A-. A total of 13 disciplines were rated A- or above, showcasing top-tier engineering strength nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Chongqing Gaokao is approximately 209,000, with an estimated 137,000 in the Physics Category (a slight decrease of about 1.5% from 139,500 in 2025), which slightly alleviates competitive pressure. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province), relatively close to Chongqing with convenient transportation. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively small (about 88-100 students), making it an inter-provincial enrollment without local preference advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in historical rankings over the past two years (854 places ahead in 2024 compared to 2023), the continued reduction of 5.68% in the 2026 enrollment plan, the top-tier university status with outstanding engineering advantages, and relatively high Douyin popularity, it is judged that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1384, with a range of 1226 to 1542.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1384, range 1226-1542. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Electrical, Automation, Computer Science, and other top engineering majors), with Tier 1 Qian Xuesen Class/Top Talent Program as a reach, and Tier 3 Smart Energy/Intelligent Manufacturing categories as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<1226), focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 755, 586, 762, 636, and 634 respectively. Overall fluctuations were significant, moving from 755 in 2021 to 586 in 2022, then retreating to 762 in 2023, and stabilizing at 636 and 634 in 2024-2025. In recent two years, rankings have stabilized, with a baseline of about 634 in 2025. Enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 9, 9, 12, 12, and 11 students respectively. The 2026 plan is 8 students, a reduction of 3 students (-27.27%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League. It has consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but the university has responded that these are rumors and has filed a case, with limited impact. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 24 (relatively hot). From 2021 to 2025, no record of enrollment gaps was found in the abnormal filing documents. Xi'an Jiaotong University is strong in engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors are Law Experimental Class and Liberal Arts Experimental Class. In discipline evaluations, Law, Philosophy, Sociology, and Chinese Language and Literature are not listed at A- or above, but the overall platform advantage of the university is prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has social popularity recommendation (relatively hot), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major has social popularity recommendation. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is about 72,000 (slightly down about 1.9% from 73,400 in 2025), a slight decrease in total examinees providing mild relief to competition pressure. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province), relatively close to Chongqing. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for History Category is small (8-12 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years (around 634), a significant reduction of 27.27% in the 2026 enrollment plan, top university level but limited History Category enrollment majors, it is judged that competition in 2026 will be significantly intensified compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 520, with a range of 461-579.
